item.title:
Barcelona, what an afternoon! 🇪🇸

item.description:
Barcelona, what an afternoon! 🇪🇸
Great vibes, engaging conversations, and quizzes that kept everyone on their toes - couldn’t have asked for a better atmosphere.
See you at the next one! https://t.co/sAifG2NpkE
--- @binance | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 1 | 💬 2 | 👁 14
item.author: @binance
